# Full Page Screenshot

## Overview
Captures full-page screenshots of web pages, including content below the fold. Useful for documentation, design reviews, and archival.

## Process
1. Navigate to target URL
2. Wait for full page load (including lazy images)
3. Capture full-page screenshot at 1x and 2x resolution
4. Optionally add device frame (desktop/tablet/mobile)
5. Save with descriptive filename

## Use Cases
- Design system documentation
- Before/after comparisons
- Bug report attachments
- Competitor analysis archives
- Responsive design validation
